job.title: Lead QA Engineer, Automation @ ABC Fitness Solutions (TS, IN)
job.description:
Join ABC Fitness and become part of a culture that’s as ambitious as it is authentic. Let’s transform the future of fitness—together!

Our Values

**Best Life**

We believe great work begins with great people. That’s why our culture is built on respect, trust, and belonging. We create an inclusive environment where every team member can bring their authentic self to work—because diverse perspectives drive innovation and meaningful impact.

**Growth Mindset**

We are doers, thinkers, and dreamers. At ABC Fitness, your growth is our investment. Through continuous learning, mentorship, and professional development opportunities, we empower you to reach new heights—personally and professionally.

**One Team**

From day one, you’ll be part of a team that collaborates, celebrates, and cares. We move fast, support one another, and have fun along the way. Because when you thrive, we all thrive.

REPONSIBILITIES:

* Be an active participant and lead day-to-day Scrum activities of the team as needed including sprint planning, daily standups, sprint reviews, and sprint retrospectives.
* Review and evaluate business requirements in the form of user stories; lead work breakdown and estimation of tasks based on requirements; provide alternative solutions and negotiate with Product Management.
* Own small to mid-sized engineering/QA projects or product areas.
* Lead technical projects; define and oversee test automation and quality delivery for your squad.
* Develop high-quality code; contribute to development standards by setting new patterns and best practices.
* Write architecture and design documentation for test frameworks and quality plans as needed.
* Review teammates' work to ensure quality and adherence to system architecture and best practices; identify where new designs will require architectural or testability changes.
* Troubleshoot and reproduce customer-found issues in a timely manner.
* Support and contribute to build, deployment, and monitoring processes with an emphasis on security, performance, and scalability.
* Design reusable test components by utilizing standard frameworks; experiment with new technologies that can enhance our QA tech stack.
* May participate in build vs. buy analysis and complex decision making for test tooling.
* Conduct regular, self-guided study to stay current on new and existing technologies; watch emerging technologies and practices and evaluate them for suitability at ABC.
* May supervise the work of QA vendor resources.

QUALIFICATIONS:

* All applicants must be able to work from our Hyderabad office 2-3x a week.
* Bachelor's degree in computer science, Software QA Engineering, or related field (or equivalent industry experience).
* 6+ years of software development or SDET experience with a strong automation focus.
* Strong proficiency in TypeScript for test automation, tooling, and framework development.
* Strong understanding of unit testing, integration testing, load testing, and related tools.
* Significant experience in full life cycle system development including design, building, testing, deployment, upgrade, and support.
* Experience with application lifecycle management tools (e.g., JIRA) and concepts for version control, work item tracking, and continuous integration.
* Hands-on experience with REST API testing.
* Strong knowledge of BDD/TDD methodologies.
* Familiarity with SQL databases and queries for test data validation.
* Experience with exploratory testing.
* Experience with CI/CD tools.
* Experience in applying different techniques, tools and approaches based on context.
* Experience in testing technically complex systems (microservice-oriented systems, distributed systems with the requirement to be fail-safe).
* Experience with shift-left testing (early in development) and shift-right testing (in production environments) techniques.
* Strong problem-solving skills. Critical thinking and attention to details.
* Excellent communication and influencing skills for collaborating with developers, product managers, and stakeholders.
* Knowledgeable about performance tuning, scalability, security, reliability, and other non-functional testing concepts.

AND IT’S GREAT TO HAVE:

* Experience with agentic-IDE development and testing practices, including AI-assisted test generation, agent-based QA tooling, and intelligent test maintenance.
* Experience with security testing and performance testing.
* Prior exposure to fitness/wellness products and multi-tenant SaaS products.

**WHAT’S IN IT FOR YOU:**

* Purpose led company with a Values focused culture – Best Life, One Team, Growth Mindset
* Time Off – competitive PTO plans with 15 Earned accrued leave, 12 days Sick leave, and 12 days Casual leave per year
* 11 Holidays plus 4 Days of Disconnect – once a quarter, we take a collective breather and enjoy a day off together around the globe. #oneteam
* Group Mediclaim insurance coverage of INR 500,000 for employee + spouse, 2 kids, and parents or parent-in-laws, and including EAP counseling
* Life Insurance and Personal Accident Insurance
* Best Life Perk – we are committed to meeting you wherever you are in your fitness journey with a quarterly reimbursement
* Premium Calm App – enjoy tranquility with a Calm App subscription for you and up to 4 dependents over the age of 16
* Support for working women with financial aid towards crèche facility, ensuring a safe and nurturing environment for their little ones while they focus on their careers

At ABC Fitness, we don’t just build technology—we build communities and transform lives. Your work matters here, your growth is supported, and your voice is heard. We welcome diverse talent and encourage you to apply, even if you don’t meet every requirement.

**ABC’S COMMITMENT TO DIVERSITY, EQUALITY, BELONGING AND INCLUSION**: ABC is an equal opportunity employer committed to diversity, equity, and inclusion. We strive to create a workplace where every employee, client, and partner feels valued, inspired, and empowered to reach their full potential. For us, inclusion isn’t just the right thing to do—it’s a business imperative. Learn more at **abcfitness.com**.

About ABC Fitness

ABC Fitness is the #1 software provider for fitness businesses of any size, all around the world. Supporting 30K clubs, 650K coaches, 40M members, and processing more than $12B in payments every year, ABC Fitness provides scalable, data-driven solutions to simplify club management and engage members and clients.

From personal trainers, boutique studios, and gyms, to international franchise health clubs, ABC Fitness will move your business forward through technology and industry insights. Innovation is at the center of everything we do, across ABC Glofox, ABC Ignite, ABC Trainerize, and ABC Evo. Let's make your fitness vision a seamless reality, together. Learn more at **abcfitness.com**

#LI-HYBRID

job.title: AI/ML Developer @ Decision Management Solutions (MH, IN)
job.description:
**Job Title:** AI/ML Developer  
**Company:** Blue Polaris (formerly Decision Management Solutions)  
**Location:** Pune District, Maharashtra, India (Hybrid)  
**Employment Type:** Full-time  
**Seniority:** Mid-level (3–5 years experience)

**About Blue Polaris**

Blue Polaris is a technology firm with a subsidiary based in Pune, India, focused on building enterprise-grade AI solutions for decision management, banking, and business automation. We develop custom AI systems that go beyond off-the-shelf tooling — including multi-agent pipelines, RAG-based knowledge systems, and LLM-integrated applications for real clients. We're a small, high-output team and the work here is hands-on from day one.

**About the Role**

We are looking for a mid-level AI/ML Developer to join our Pune team and contribute to the development of intelligent, production-ready AI systems. You'll work primarily on building and integrating AI models — LLMs, RAG pipelines, multi-agent architectures — while also contributing to the backend and frontend layers needed to bring those systems to life. This is a builder role; you'll be expected to take ownership of features end to end.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Design, develop, and deploy AI-powered applications using Python, integrating LLMs, RAG systems, and multi-agent frameworks
* Build and optimise NLP pipelines, including fine-tuning, prompt engineering, and retrieval-augmented generation
* Develop and maintain backend APIs (FastAPI/Node.js) to expose AI models and connect them to frontend interfaces
* Work with vector databases (Qdrant, FAISS, Neo4j) and embedding models to support knowledge retrieval systems
* Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate AI components into scalable, production-ready applications
* Contribute to MLOps practices including model versioning, monitoring, and deployment workflows
* Stay current with developments in GenAI, agentic AI, and open-source LLM tooling

**Required Skills & Qualifications**

* 3–5 years of hands-on software development experience, with at least 2 years focused on AI/ML
* Strong Python proficiency — you write clean, production-quality code
* Practical experience with LLMs and GenAI frameworks: LangChain, LangGraph, Hugging Face Transformers, or similar
* Experience building RAG systems or multi-agent AI pipelines
* Familiarity with NLP concepts: embeddings, token classification, text generation, semantic search
* Backend development experience with FastAPI, REST APIs, or Node.js
* Basic frontend capability (React.js or similar) sufficient to build interfaces for AI tools
* Experience with vector databases or graph databases (Qdrant, FAISS, Neo4j, or similar)
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Information Technology, or a related field (or equivalent practical experience)

**Nice to Have**

* Experience with PyTorch — custom model training, fine-tuning (PEFT, LoRA, QLoRA), or ONNX optimisation
* Familiarity with IBM WatsonX, WatsonX Orchestrate, or WatsonX Assistant
* MLOps or LLMOps experience: model monitoring, CI/CD for ML pipelines, deployment tooling
* Exposure to cloud platforms: AWS (S3, EC2, SageMaker) or equivalent
* Experience with BPMN or workflow automation concepts

Pay: ₹1,200,000.00 - ₹1,400,000.00 per year

Benefits:

* Cell phone reimbursement
* Paid sick time
* Paid time off
* Provident Fund

Application Question(s):

* What is your current notice period as per your employment contract?
* What is your current CTC (Cost to Company) per annum in INR, and what are your salary expectations for this role?
* Briefly describe an AI/ML application or system you have built end-to-end — from problem definition through to deployment. What was your specific role and what tech stack did you use?
* Have you worked with Large Language Models (LLMs) or Generative AI in a professional setting? If yes, describe the use case and how you integrated the model into an application.
* What is RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) and have you built a RAG pipeline? If yes, what vector database or retrieval mechanism did you use and why?
* Describe your experience with Python for AI/ML development. What libraries and frameworks do you use regularly, and can you give an example of a complex problem you solved using Python?
* Have you worked with multi-agent AI systems or agentic frameworks such as LangGraph, CrewAI, or AutoGen? If yes, describe the architecture you built and the problem it solved.
* What is your experience with NLP tasks such as text classification, named entity recognition, semantic search, or language translation? Describe a specific NLP project you worked on.
* Describe your experience building backend APIs for AI applications. What frameworks have you used and how did you expose an AI model as a service?
* Have you worked with any frontend technologies such as React.js, Streamlit, or Gradio to build interfaces for AI systems? Describe what you built and its purpose.
* Describe your experience with model fine-tuning, prompt engineering, or any form of model customisation. What approach did you take and what was the outcome?
* How do you stay current with developments in AI and machine learning? Mention any recent development, paper, tool, or technique you have explored in the last 3–6 months.
* Describe a situation where an AI model or system you built did not perform as expected. What went wrong, how did you diagnose the issue, and what did you do to fix it?
* Are you currently based in Pune, Maharashtra? If not, are you open to relocating, and what would your timeline for relocation be?
* Do you have a GitHub profile, portfolio, or any publicly available work such as research papers, open-source contributions, or personal projects that you would like to share? If yes, please provide the links.

Work Location: Hybrid remote in Pune, Maharashtra (Pune, Pune District)

job.title: Software Developer @ Sat Kartar Shopping Ltd (DL, IN)
job.description:
**Backend Developer**

**About the Company**

**Sat Kartar Life Limited** is a leading *IPO-listed* organization with a strong nationwide presence.

* **Websites**: satkartar.in | skinrange.com
* **Workforce**: 2200+ employees
* **Presence**: 40+ branches across India
* **Healthcare**: Sat Kartar Sanjeevan Hospital, Delhi

**Position Details**

* · **Role:** Backend Developer
* · **Office Locations:** Connaught Place, Delhi
* · **Office Timings:** 9:30 AM - 6:30 PM
* · **Work Mode:** 5 Days WFO + 1 Day WFH
* · **Salary Range:** 5.4 LPA - 7.2 LPA
* · **Joining:** Immediate joiners preferred
* · **Experience required:** PHP (CodeIgniter / Laravel), MySQL, and API

**Job Description**

We are looking for a Backend Developer with strong experience in **PHP, MySQL, and API** development. The candidate should be able to handle backend logic independently and coordinate with frontend teams. Full Stack exposure will be an added advantage.

**Key Responsibilities**

* Develop and maintain backend applications using **PHP (CodeIgniter / Laravel).**
* Design, manage, and optimize **SQL / MySQL databases**.
* Build and maintain **REST APIs** for frontend and third-party integrations.
* Integrate backend APIs with frontend applications.
* Implement authentication mechanisms such as JWT.
* Handle basic third-party API and payment gateway integrations.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and enhance existing backend systems.
* Coordinate with frontend and internal teams for smooth project delivery.
* Follow best coding practices, security standards, and data protection guidelines.

**Requirements**

* 5 - 10 years of experience as a Backend Developer.
* Strong knowledge of PHP and backend logic.
* Hands-on experience with MySQL.
* Experience in developing and integrating REST APIs.
* Basic understanding of frontend or Full Stack development is a plus.
* Good communication and problem-solving skills.

Pay: ₹45,000.00 - ₹65,000.00 per month

Work Location: In person

job.title: Junior Software Developer @ Taski Technologies Private Limited (KA, IN)
job.description:
Junior Software Developer - taSki

**About the Job:**

Our engineers build technologies that power how our users connect, create, and grow. We work at scale — our products handle millions of requests, large volumes of data, and demand systems that are fast, reliable, and secure.

We're looking for a Full Stack Engineer who brings ideas across the entire stack — backend services, distributed systems, databases, caching, event-driven architectures, and AI integrations. You'll work on projects critical to our product's growth, with the opportunity to evolve as the team does.

We need engineers who are versatile, show ownership, and are enthusiastic about taking on new challenges. If you thrive in fast-paced environments, learn quickly, and love building — we'd love to hear from you.

**Key Responsibilities:**

●Design and develop scalable backend services using Node.js following microservice and event-driven patterns.

●Build responsive and performant UIs with React.js or Vue.js that deliver delightful user experiences.

●Architect distributed systems with a deep understanding of trade-offs in availability, consistency, and performance.

●Implement and manage data layers across MongoDB and MySQL, optimising queries and schema design for real-world loads.

●Leverage Redis for caching strategies, session management, and pub/sub event pipelines.

●Design and integrate AI/ML capabilities into product features — LLM APIs, embeddings, agents, or custom pipelines.

●Own the end-to-end lifecycle of features — from design and implementation to testing, deployment, and monitoring.

●Collaborate in an async-first environment, writing clear documentation and participating in architecture reviews. Proactively explore new tools, patterns, and technologies that could improve our systems or team velocity.

REQUIRED SKILLS & EXPERIENCE

Backend Development

●Solid experience with Node.js — REST APIs, async patterns, streams, and performance tuning.

●Working knowledge of Python for scripting, data pipelines, or service development.

Architecture & System Design

●Ability to design microservice systems with clear service boundaries and communication contracts.

●Understanding of event-driven architecture, CQRS, and eventual consistency patterns.

●Experience with cloud platforms and containerisation (Docker).

AI Integrations

●Experience integrating LLM APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini) or building AI-powered features.

●Exposure to vector databases, RAG pipelines, or AI agent frameworks is a bonus.

Frontend Development

●Proficiency in Vue.js and/or Next.js / React.js including SSR, SSG, routing, and state management.

●Comfortable with component architecture, hooks, and modern JavaScript (ES2020+).

Databases

●MongoDB — schema design, aggregation pipelines, indexing, and Atlas usage.

●MySQL — relational modeling, complex joins, transactions, and query optimisation.

Caching & Messaging

●Hands-on Redis experience for caching, rate limiting, TTL strategies, and pub/sub.

●Familiarity with message brokers (Kafka, RabbitMQ, or similar) is a strong plus.

**THE MINDSET WE'RE LOOKING FOR**

Skills can be taught. Curiosity cannot. Above all else, we are looking for someone who embodies these traits:

●You explore tech not because you have to, but because you genuinely love to understand how things work.

●You treat every sprint, PR, and incident as a chance to grow. You read docs, watch talks, and run experiments.

●You do not wait for perfect conditions. You build, iterate, and ship.

●You understand how components interact and make decisions with the big picture in mind.

●You communicate clearly, give thoughtful code reviews, and make the people around you better.

●You embrace feedback, admit what you do not know, and actively seek to fill the gaps.

NICE TO HAVE

●Experience with serverless architectures (AWS Lambda).

●Contributions to open source projects or personal side projects.

●Prior experience working in a startup or high-growth product environment.

●Understanding of security best practices — OWASP, auth patterns, data encryption.

**WHAT WE OFFER**

●A high-trust environment where your ideas are heard and your work ships to real users.

●A team that values learning — conference budgets, internal talks, and time to experiment.

●Competitive compensation, flexible hours, and remote-first work culture.

●Access to cutting-edge tools and the latitude to choose the right technology for the job.

●A front-row seat to the AI revolution — we are building AI-native products from day one.

**HOW TO APPLY**

We review applications on a rolling basis. Send us your resume, a link to your GitHub or portfolio, and a short note (2–3 sentences) on what you have been most excited to learn in the last six months.

We do not care about pedigree. We care about passion, potential, and proof of work.

Pay: Up to ₹300,000.00 per year

Application Question(s):

* Are you an immediate joiner?
* what is your current CTC?
* what is your expected CTC?

Experience:

* Node.js: 1 year (Required)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Senior Software Engineer - Frontend/Fullstack, UI Platform @ Rippling (KA, IN)
job.description:
#### **About Rippling**

Rippling gives businesses one place to run HR, IT, and Finance. It brings together all of the workforce systems that are normally scattered across a company, like payroll, expenses, benefits, and computers. For the first time ever, you can manage and automate every part of the employee lifecycle in a single system.

Take onboarding, for example. With Rippling, you can hire a new employee anywhere in the world and set up their payroll, corporate card, computer, benefits, and even third-party apps like Slack and Microsoft 365 - all within 90 seconds.

Based in San Francisco, CA, Rippling has raised $1.85B+ from the world’s top investors - including Kleiner Perkins, Founders Fund, Sequoia, Greenoaks, Bedrock, GIC, Elad Gil and Goldman Sachs and was named one of America's best startup employers by Forbes.

*We prioritize candidate safety. Please be aware that all official communication will only be sent from @rippling.com addresses.*

**About the UI Platform Team**

The UI Platform team is a foundational platform team shaping how products are designed, built, and delivered at Rippling.

As Rippling continues to scale across products and engineering teams, excellence cannot be left to individual implementation alone. UI Platform builds the shared systems, design patterns, application architecture, performance guardrails, and delivery foundations that help teams ship high-quality product experiences with speed, reliability, and consistency.

The team works across core areas such as:

* **Application Framework / SDUI** – enabling product teams to build configurable, scalable, and consistent product experiences.
* **Design System** – powering reusable primitives, patterns, and guardrails across Rippling products.
* **Frontend Infrastructure** – evolving Rippling’s web architecture for scale, performance, and independent product delivery.
* **Performance and Product Experience** – raising the quality bar across product surfaces.
* **AI-native Developer Experience** – building infrastructure that helps engineers and AI agents write, validate, and ship production-quality code more reliably.

This team partners closely with 40+ product teams across Rippling and plays a central role in improving developer velocity, product consistency, and customer experience at scale.

**About the Role**

* We are looking for a **Senior Software Engineer – Frontend-Fullstack** to join Rippling’s UI Platform team.
* This is a hands-on engineering role for someone who is strong in frontend engineering, comfortable working across the stack, and excited about building platform systems that are used by many product teams.
* In this role, you will work on Rippling’s **Application Framework / Server Driven UI platform**, helping product teams build and integrate scalable, configuration-driven user experiences. You will partner with engineers, designers, product managers, and platform stakeholders across the company to solve high-leverage problems that improve how Rippling products are built and shipped.
* The ideal candidate has strong frontend fundamentals, practical backend exposure, good product intuition, and the ability to collaborate effectively across multiple teams. This role is approximately **80% frontend and 20% backend**, with a strong emphasis on building reusable frameworks, scalable UI architecture, and developer-facing platform capabilities.
* You should be comfortable owning projects end-to-end, driving technical clarity, communicating well with partner teams, and operating in a fast-moving environment where platform decisions can impact dozens of product surfaces.

**What You Will Do**

* Build and evolve Rippling’s **Application Framework / SDUI platform**, enabling product teams to create configurable, consistent, and scalable user experiences.
* Partner with **40+ product teams** to support adoption, integration, and evolution of UI Platform capabilities.
* Design and implement reusable frontend platform primitives, patterns, abstractions, and workflows that improve engineering velocity across Rippling.
* Work closely with Design, Product, and Engineering teams to translate platform requirements into high-quality technical solutions.
* Contribute to frontend architecture, performance improvements, developer tooling, and platform reliability.
* Build backend components where needed to support configuration-driven UI, schema-based rendering, platform APIs, and internal tooling.
* Help improve the developer experience for product engineers building on top of Rippling’s UI Platform.
* Participate in technical design discussions, code reviews, debugging, testing, rollout planning, and production support.
* Use AI tools thoughtfully to improve development velocity, code quality, validation, and engineering workflows.
* Collaborate with senior engineers to drive larger projects, influence technical direction, and raise the quality bar across the team.
* Contribute to platform systems such as design systems, shared UI infrastructure, performance guardrails, and AI-assisted development workflows.

**Qualifications**

* **6–9 years of professional software engineering experience**, preferably with strong frontend/platform/product engineering exposure.
* Strong hands-on experience building complex frontend applications using modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks such as **React**.
* Solid understanding of frontend architecture, component design, state management, performance, accessibility, testing, and maintainability.
* Experience building reusable UI systems, internal platforms, frontend infrastructure, or developer-facing frameworks.
* Comfortable working fullstack, with backend exposure in areas such as APIs, services, data modeling, schemas, configuration systems, or platform integrations.
* Ability to independently own well-defined to moderately ambiguous projects from design through execution, launch, and iteration.
* Strong collaboration and communication skills, especially when working with multiple product teams and cross-functional stakeholders.
* Good product and design sensibility; able to balance platform consistency with product flexibility.
* Comfortable operating in a fast-paced environment with evolving priorities and high ownership.
* Practical exposure to AI tools, AI-assisted development, agentic workflows, orchestration, or automation is strongly preferred.
* Experience with design systems, component libraries, SDUI, schema-driven UI, or configuration-driven platforms is a strong plus.

**Nice to Have**

* Experience building or contributing to **design systems** or shared frontend platforms.
* Experience with **server-driven UI / schema-driven UI / configuration-driven rendering**.
* Exposure to frontend monorepos, micro-frontends, module federation, or large-scale web architecture.
* Experience building internal developer tools, platform APIs, or productivity infrastructure.
* Familiarity with AI coding tools, AI agent workflows, prompt orchestration, automated validation, or code-generation systems.
* Experience working in a platform team that supports multiple product teams.

**What Makes This Role Exciting**

* You will build systems that directly impact how 40+ product teams build and ship at Rippling.
* You will work on high-leverage platform problems across frontend architecture, SDUI, design systems, performance, and developer experience.
* You will help shape the future of AI-assisted development inside a large production web application.
* You will work on foundational systems where improvements benefit every product team, not just one feature area.
* You will get strong ownership, high visibility, and the opportunity to grow toward Staff-level platform scope over time.

job.title: Python Senior Technical Lead - DevOps @ HCLTech (TN, IN)
job.description:
Chennai, Tamil Nadu
  
Job Summary
  
  
Designs, develops, and enhances enterprise Python and Django applications that support business operations and digital initiatives. Delivers scalable, secure, and reliable solutions through application development, system integration, database optimization, and data transformation. Collaborate with Business Analysts, architects, and cross-functional teams to translate business requirements into technical solutions, improve operational efficiency, and support innovation through DevOps practices and the integration of Generative AI capabilities within enterprise platforms.
  
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1. Lead the design and development of devops solutions using python and github.
  
2. Create and manage ci/cd pipelines to automate software delivery processes.
  
3. Collaborate with cross functional teams to integrate devops best practices into the software development lifecycle.
  
4. Monitor and optimize system performance, reliability, and scalability.
  
5. Implement security and compliance measures in devops processes.
  
6. Provide technical guidance and mentorship to team members.
  
7. Continuously research and evaluate new technologies to enhance existing processes.
  
Skill Requirements
  
7+ years of hands‑on experience with Python and Django, including complex application development.
  
5+ years of experience with SQL development, optimization, and database design.
  
At least 1–2 years of hands-on experience implementing Generative AI technologies, including GPT models, embeddings, and agent-based solutions.
  
2-3 years of experience in Angular.
  
Deep expertise in application architecture, system integration, and service-oriented architecture principles.
  
Strong experience with DevOps tools and practices, including Git, Azure DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and automated deployments.
  
Advanced understanding of REST, SOAP, WSDL, and large‑scale service integrations.
  
Demonstrated technical leadership experience with the ability to mentor developers, provide design guidance, and promote engineering best practices.
  
  
Other Requirements
  
Design and develop Python and Django applications that are scalable, secure, and maintainable.
  
Implement UI components using CSS, Bootstrap, jQuery, or similar technologies as needed.
  
Develop integrations with internal and external systems using REST, SOAP, and WSDL‑based services.
  
Create and optimize SQL queries, database structures, and data access logic to support application features.
  
Work with Business Analysts and stakeholders to translate functional requirements into technical specifications and solutions.
  
Implement accurate data mappings and transformations in accordance with business and technical requirements.
  
Contribute to code reviews, follow established coding standards, and ensure high‑quality deliverables.
  
Support the implementation and maintenance of DevOps pipelines using Git and Azure DevOps.
  
Contribute to the integration of GenAI capabilities—including GPT models, embeddings, and agent‑based components—into enterprise applications.
  
Troubleshoot issues across the application stack and collaborate closely with peers to resolve technical challenges.
  
Provide technical leadership, mentoring, and guidance to development team members while promoting coding standards and engineering best practices.

job.title: Talent Acquisition Specialist – IT Staffing (Contract Hiring) @ Mappoptimist Technologies (Remote, IN)
job.description:
Talent Acquisition Specialist – IT Staffing**(Contract Hiring)**

**Company:** MappOptimist Technologies

**Experience:** 2–5 Years

**Employment Type:** Full-Time

**Location:** Remote

MappOptimist Technologies is a global IT consulting and staffing company delivering skilled technology professionals to clients across the USA, UK, UAE, Europe, and other international markets. We specialize in contract staffing, dedicated teams, and technology consulting across AI, Cloud, Salesforce, Microsoft Technologies, Blockchain, Data Engineering, and Software Development.

Role Overview

We are looking for an experienced IT Talent Acquisition Specialist who can proactively build a strong database of contract IT professionals before client requirements arise. The ideal candidate should be highly skilled in sourcing, engaging, screening, and maintaining relationships with freelance and contract developers across multiple technologies.

Key Responsibilities

* Build and maintain a database of pre-screened IT professionals.
* Source contract developers through LinkedIn, Upwork, Toptal, GitHub, Indeed, Naukri, Wellfound, and other professional communities.
* Identify candidates across technologies including:
* AI/ML & GenAI
* Data Engineering
* Blockchain
* Web & Mobile
* Cloud & DevOps
* Salesforce
* Microsoft Dynamics 365
* SailPoint & IAM
* Conduct initial HR screening calls.
* Assess communication skills, availability, notice period, hourly/monthly rates, location, and contract preferences.
* Maintain accurate candidate records in ATS/Google Sheets/CRM.
* Build long-term relationships with high-quality contractors.
* Coordinate interviews between candidates and clients.
* Ensure the talent pipeline remains updated and deployment-ready.

Required Skills

* 2–5 years of IT recruitment experience.
* Experience in contract staffing or IT staffing.
* Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).
* Strong sourcing expertise using LinkedIn Recruiter, job portals, and professional communities.
* Ability to identify quality technical talent.
* Experience maintaining candidate databases and ATS.
* Comfortable working with international clients and time zones.
* Strong negotiation and follow-up skills.
* Self-driven, organized, and target-oriented.

Preferred Skills

* Experience recruiting for US, UK, or Middle East clients.
* Understanding of C2C, W2, 1099, or offshore staffing models.
* Familiarity with major cloud and software technologies.

Platforms You'll Use

* LinkedIn Recruiter
* Upwork
* Toptal
* Wellfound
* Indeed
* Naukri
* GitHub
* Stack Overflow
* Dice (preferred)
* Monster
* Internal referrals

Success Metrics (KPIs)

* 300–500 new qualified candidates added every month.
* 90% profile accuracy.
* 100% candidate verification.
* Less than 24-hour response time for new requirements.
* Strong candidate engagement and database freshness.

Benefits:

* Flexible schedule

Application Question(s):

* 1. How many years of IT recruitment experience do you have?

2. Have you worked in IT Contract Staffing?  
3.Which markets have you recruited for?  
4. Which sourcing platforms have you used?  
5. Approximately how many technical candidates have you sourced in the last 12 months?  
6. Have you recruited for any of the following technologies?  
7. Are you comfortable conducting HR screening interviews independently?  
8. Rate your English communication skills.  
9. Have you used any ATS or CRM?  
10. How soon can you join?  
11. What is your current CTC?  
12. What is your expected CTC?  
13. Are you comfortable working with international clients and overlapping time zones when required?  
14. This role requires proactive sourcing and building a ready-to-deploy talent pipeline before client requirements arrive. Are you comfortable working in such an environment?

Work Location: Remote

job.title: Full Stack Developer (2+ Years Experience) (MP, IN)
job.description:
**Location:** Madhya Pradesh, India (On-site)  
**Job Type:** Full-time  
**Experience:** 2+ Years

About the Role

Profilics Systems Pvt. Ltd. is looking for a **Software Engineer (Backend)** with **2+ years of professional experience** to join our engineering team. You will be responsible for designing, developing, and maintaining production-grade backend applications that power business-critical systems for our clients.

This role is ideal for engineers who enjoy solving complex technical problems, writing clean and maintainable code, and taking ownership of projects from development through deployment. You'll work in a collaborative environment where engineering quality, reliability, and long-term maintainability are prioritized.

Responsibilities

* Design, develop, and maintain scalable backend applications and REST APIs.
* Write clean, efficient, and maintainable production-quality code.
* Participate in system design, architecture discussions, and technical decision-making.
* Debug, troubleshoot, and resolve production issues.
* Optimize application performance, database queries, and backend services.
* Collaborate with team members to deliver reliable, high-quality software.
* Review code and follow software development best practices.
* Contribute to improving existing systems and reducing technical debt.

Requirements

* **2+ years of professional experience** in software development.
* Strong understanding of Computer Science fundamentals, data structures, algorithms, and Object-Oriented Programming (OOP).
* Hands-on experience with backend development using server-side technologies.
* Experience building and consuming RESTful APIs.
* Strong knowledge of relational databases (MySQL, PostgreSQL, etc.) and SQL.
* Experience with Git, testing practices, and CI/CD workflows.
* Good problem-solving and debugging skills.
* Strong communication and collaboration abilities.
* Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.

Why Join Profilics Systems?

* Work on real-world, production-grade backend systems.
* Be part of a small, engineering-focused team with high ownership.
* Opportunity to influence technical decisions and system architecture.
* Collaborative work environment focused on learning and long-term growth.
* Meaningful projects that directly impact businesses and their operations.

Pay: ₹10,000.00 - ₹40,000.00 per month

Location:

* Ujjain, Madhya Pradesh (Required)

Work Location: In person

job.title: Frontend Developer @ RemoteStar (KA, IN)
job.description:
**Frontend Developer – Customer Data & Workforce Solutions**

**About the Role**

As a Frontend Developer, you will be dedicated to developing and improving the client-side of a mission-critical application. You’ll collaborate closely with backend engineers, analysts, and testers, ensuring our technicians have intuitive, high-performing tools at their fingertips.

**What You’ll Do**

Develop and maintain sophisticated web interfaces using **Angular (currently v11, plans to upgrade)**, ensuring usability and performance.

Implement and manage state using **NGRX**, making the app scalable and maintainable.

Contribute to the design and architecture of the frontend modules based on business requirements.

Use **GIT** for version control and collaboration within the development team

Work with agile methodologies (SCRUM) and apply test-driven development principles.

Collaborate actively with your peers to deliver features and releases on schedule.

Help document solutions for users, developers, and testers.

Provide frontend expertise to support incident resolution when needed.

Drive adoption of CI/CD practices in frontend development.

**Our Frontend Technology Stack**

Angular 11 (upgrading soon)

NGRX (state management)

TypeScript

GIT (version control)

Mocha (Unit testing)

**For Information – Our Backend Technology Stack**

While this role is focused on frontend development, you will collaborate closely with our backend team, whose stack includes:

Node.js

TypeScript

REST APIs

Couchbase

Sync Gateway

.NET

Experience with how these technologies interact with the frontend is beneficial.

**What We’re Looking For**

**Must-Have**

Bachelor or Master’s degree in Computer Science, IT, or equivalent experience.

Strong hands-on experience developing with **Angular** and **NGRX**.

Advanced proficiency in **TypeScript**.

Solid working knowledge of **GIT** for code management and collaboration.

Good understanding of **Observables** and **Promises** in JavaScript/TypeScript, and their use in building reactive web applications.

Experience working in agile (SCRUM) environments.

Familiarity with CI/CD and automated testing for frontend code.

Good communication skills in English (oral and written).

**Nice-to-Have**

Exposure to tooling and frameworks that enhance software quality and developer productivity.

Experience with web-based REST API integration.

Understanding of reactive and functional programming patterns.

Interest or background in collaborating with backend teams.

Experience mentoring or leading small frontend groups.

**Soft Skills**

Customer-centric and solution-oriented approach.

Creative mindset, continuously seeking simple and effective solutions.

Strong collaboration and open communication style.

job.title: Senior Technical Lead @ HCLTech (KA, IN)
job.description:
Bengaluru, Karnataka
  
Job Summary
  
To be responsible for managing technology in complex projects ,providing technical guidance and ensuring successful delivery of solutions.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
1. To be responsible for providing technical guidance to a team of developers, enhancing their technical capabilities and increasing productivity.
  
2. To conduct comprehensive code reviews, establish and oversee quality assurance processes, performance optimization , implementation of best practices and coding standards to ensure successful delivery of complex projects.
  
3. To ensure process compliance in the assigned module| and participate in technical discussions/review as a technical consultant for feasibility study (technical alternatives, best packages, supporting architecture best practices, technical risks, breakdown into components, estimations).
  
4. To collaborate with stakeholders to define project scope, objectives, deliverables and accordingly prepare and submit status reports for minimizing exposure & closure of escalations.
  
  
Skill Requirements
  
  
**Mandatory :**  
An absolutely must-have is a strong experience of software development in micro-services architecture
  
Experience with containerized solutions with Kubernetes
  
Experience in full stack development with backend in .NET and frontend in React JS
  
Strong IT development skills to manage all phases of a software development life cycle with high-quality standards, including business analysis, development, testing, deployment, and follow-up.
  
Ability to think globally and contribute to the development of IoT practice guidelines
  
  
**Recommended:**  
Experience in development of asset tracking solutions in global industries
  
experience on Microsoft Azure IoT
  
  
**Would be a plus:** experience on Omlox Hub standard
  
Other Requirements
  
  
**Mandatory :**  
An absolutely must-have is a strong experience of software development in micro-services architecture
  
Experience with containerized solutions with Kubernetes
  
Experience in full stack development with backend in .NET and frontend in React JS
  
Strong IT development skills to manage all phases of a software development life cycle with high-quality standards, including business analysis, development, testing, deployment, and follow-up.
  
Ability to think globally and contribute to the development of IoT practice guidelines
  
  
**Recommended:**  
Experience in development of asset tracking solutions in global industries
  
experience on Microsoft Azure IoT
  
  
**Would be a plus:** experience on Omlox Hub standard

job.title: Senior Mobile Developer @ veltris (MH, IN)
job.description:
### **Job Information**

Work Experience

7 - 9 Years

Date Opened

07/14/2026

Industry

IT Services

Job Type

Full Time Employment

City

Pune, Hyderabad

State/Province

Maharashtra

Country

India

Zip/Postal Code

411001

### **Job Description**

GENERAL DESCRIPTION: This role provides technical leadership, including the design, development and delivery of business technology-enabled applications, products and services. The Lead Engineer is responsible for meeting project schedules and ensuring the delivered solution meets the technical specifications and design requirements. This role drives proficiency within teams, provides resolution to technical issues, assures best practices are followed, and assists management in meeting strategic initiatives while contributing to smooth business operations.

ESSENTIAL DUTIES AND RESPONSIBILITIES

 Coordinates technical tasks and ensures teams are working efficiently; oversees the development/support of specific IT areas and systems, and timely delivery of projects. (25%)

 Contributes to defining new business requirements; identifies and communicates risks to the business; investigates and proposes new tools and frameworks to deliver quality products faster. (10%)

 Acts as a liaison between project management, technical teams and IT leadership; assures best practices are defined and followed; drives consistency across applications and projects wherever possible. (5%)

 Manages all aspects of coding for the team – branching, code review, ensure code reusability and maintainability with constant refactoring, collaboration with Enterprise Architecture team on standards and approaches. Ultimately accountable for the quality of the code for the project. (10%)

 Coding project deliverables (25%)

 Mentor developers and help resolve technical roadblocks; conduct collaborative code reviews and coordinate the deployment and implementation of software solutions; recognize organizational/team challenges and address them with management. (20%)

 Available for production application deployment and troubleshooting hours and/or on an on-call basis. (5%)

SUPERVISORY RESPONSIBILITIES:

 This position does not have formal supervisory responsibility; however, it has overall leadership responsibility for the work of team members in the context of technical leadership.

DECISION-MAKING RESPONSIBILITIES:

 This position requires independent decision-making and recommendations within the context of assigned projects, stakeholders, and management teams.

EDUCATION/EXPERIENCE:

 Bachelor's degree or equivalent related work or military experience

 8+ years’ software development experience including creating business applications with relational and non-relational database systems, within a fast-paced software development environment.

 4+ years of demonstrated experience in a technical lead role.

 4+ years of mobile application development Android required

 Advanced knowledge of IT software development methodologies and processes in an agile environment (Scrum).

 Full Stack development experience using C#, Xamarin/Maui, and React Native

 Experience with SQL and relational databases (Oracle)

 Experience creating and consuming distributed data services (REST APIs, Messaging Buses) and SOA design patterns.

 Experience gathering, analyzing and documenting feature requirements.

 Experience with multithreaded application design

 Experience working under multiple operating systems like Windows, UNIX (Sun Solaris and Linux) and UNIX Shell scripting.

 Experience with asynchronous messaging frameworks for application integration, Google Firebase preferred.

 Experience in production support activities by monitoring and troubleshooting of production issues.

 Experience in source control management using GIT.

 Effective independent, team player and self-starter with high adaptability to modern technologies.

 Additional desirable skills and experience include:

o Transportation and logistics industry experience (desirable).

o Strong proficiency in at least one of the following roles: business analyst, project manager, and data analyst.

 JOB RELATED COMPETENCIES:

Analytical & Problem-Solving Skills -

o Focus on data driven analysis for solutioning and problem solving.

o Encourages creative problem solving and lateral thinking to foster innovative solutions.

o Identifies opportunities to increase accuracy and optimize resources; develops/recommends/implements solutions.

o Ability to identify and assess project risks and issues, and drive mitigation planning and issue resolution.

o Demonstrated ability to navigate ambiguity, deliver results and operate effectively in an Agile environment.

 Communication Skills –

o Strong verbal and written communication skills including presentation and active listening skills.

o Ability to communicate business needs to technical people and effectively communicate complex technical information to a non-technical audience.

o Utilizes a variety of interpersonal styles / communication methods to adapt to new work structures, processes, or cultures.

 Business Acumen -

o Strong business focus with demonstrated ability to act in partnership with internal and external stakeholders.

o Deep understanding of business processes across multiple domains.

 Other -

o High-level learning agility.

o Passionate, self-motivated; works with a sense of urgency under minimal supervision within a fast-paced environment.

o Maintains strict confidentiality, high integrity, and high reliability.

o Ability to bring resolution to highly complex and stressful situations with multiple stakeholders (information technology, operations, engineering, sales, customers/vendors.)

o Ability to lead and motivate professionals to produce high quality results.

Technical Competencies

o Android

o C#/Xamarin/Maui

o React-Native

o Typescript/JavaScript

o Java/Kotlin (preferred)

WORK ENVIRONMENT & PHYSICAL DEMANDS-

Workspace

 This job operates in a professional office / cubicle environment with moderate noise levels. This role routinely uses standard office equipment such as computers, phones, and photocopiers.

Hours of Work/Travel

 Extended hours including weekends.
